prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.1 kg; Height 169.6 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.8%; 6 months ago 10.3%; 3 months ago 10.8%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 279mg/dL; 6 months ago 224mg/dL; 3 months ago 313mg/dL; current 234mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 102.3kg; 9 months ago 96.6kg; 6 months ago 97.8kg; 3 months ago 96.2kg; current 98.1kg), Height (12 months ago 169.6cm; 9 months ago 169.6cm; 6 months ago 169.6cm; 3 months ago 169.6cm; current 169.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 35.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 45U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 299mg/g; 9 months ago 243mg/g; 6 months ago 252mg/g; 3 months ago 266mg/g; current 361mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 103mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
